title: Mclaren F1 Paintings
description: Make your world stand out with these cool Mclaren F1 Paintings!
body:
# 🟠McLaren F1: Resource Pack

Show your love for the McLaren Formula 1 team by using these paintings..

This resource pack replaces ll of the default Minecraft paintings with photos of various McLaren F1 cars and it's current drivers, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri.

## Features
- Over 40 unique McLaren images.  
- Fully compatible without extra mods!
